classes.reasoning: Document explicitly identifies itself as 'ICF-002 — Re-Consent Form' in the header and contains signature blocks for participant and investigator consent, with participant declaration text confirming informed consent to continue in the study.

summary: This is a re-consent form (ICF version 3.0) for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, informing already-enrolled participants of two protocol changes introduced in Amendment 2: the addition of ondansetron anti-nausea medication and an extra liquid biopsy blood sample at Cycle 3. Participants must review and sign to confirm they wish to continue in the Phase II study of BRC-471 (Lumitanib) for advanced lung cancer.
